narrative:
Toledo City has 167,437 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.5 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.5% D−R vs +28.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
